name: Allspice Poppy Seed Wafers
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Grease heavy large cookie sheets.
In a bowl, combine flour, poppy seeds, allspice and salt.
Using a vegetable peeler, remove the peel from an orange in strips and place them in a food processor. Add sugar and process until the peel is finely minced, about 2 minutes.
Using an electric mixer, beat the unsalted butter and orange-sugar mixture in a medium bowl until fluffy. Beat in egg yolks. Add dry ingredients and beat at low speed until a smooth soft dough forms.
Transfer half of the dough to a pastry bag fitted with a large (number 7) star tip. Pipe the dough onto prepared sheets in 1-inch mounds, spacing them 2 inches apart. Repeat with the remaining dough.
Bake until the cookies are golden on top and brown on bottom, about 12 minutes. Let the cookies stand on the sheets for 3 minutes before transferring to racks to cool completely.
For Glaze: In a small bowl, blend powdered sugar with enough cream to form a smooth medium-thin glaze. Spread the glaze over the cookies. Sprinkle with poppy seeds. Let set for 40 minutes.
